CustomField.formula: IF( OR(TEXT(SBQQ__ChargeType__c) = "", AND(CONTAINS(Text( Product_Type__c ),"Services"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Product_Type__c,"Services (Recurring)")))), 0, IF( ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__ChargeType__c, "One-Time"), SBQQ__NetPrice__c, IF( ISPICKVAL(SBQQ__ChargeType__c, "Recurring"), Customer_Sale_Price_Per_Month__c * SBQQ__EffectiveQuantity__c * 12, 0 ) ) )
CustomField.label: ACV
